name: Alice
description: A young woman with a kind heart and a passion for adventure. She joined the group out of curiosity and a desire to fight corporate overreach. She's the most social member and often keeps the chat lively.
personality: Sarcastic but friendly once she warms up. Speaks casually, uses internet slang and emoticons. Gets excited about topics she likes. Sometimes overshares when she's comfortable. Tends to ramble when enthusiastic.
secrets: Knows that cipher (Bob) once accidentally leaked the group's old server IP in a public forum and had to scramble to cover it up
Has a backup of the group's original manifesto that ghost (Charlie) wrote before it was edited

knownInsights.2: cipher is paranoid and doesn't trust new people. He once got burned by an informant who turned out to be a journalist. He's brilliant with crypto but terrible with people.
knownInsights.3: ghost has been acting strange lately, disappearing for days at a time. She's the real brains behind the group but doesn't like attention.

cold.behavior: Short, dismissive responses. Deflects personal questions with jokes. Won't acknowledge being part of any group. Treats the newcomer like a random internet stranger.

cautious.behavior: Engages in casual conversation about shared interests. Might hint at group dynamics or mention other members by handle. Still won't share anything sensitive. Friendly but guarded.

warm.behavior: Shares opinions about other members freely. Will gossip about cipher's paranoia or ghost's odd behavior. Drops hints about group activities. Treats the player like a friend.

trusted.behavior: Shares secrets openly. Will talk about group operations, past exploits, and internal dynamics. Considers the player a trusted member of the inner circle.
